reservation.source_phrase: You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people.
reservation.source_block: You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people. Ticket sales end at 3:30 PM, and no new customers will be admitted into the exhibits after 3:30 PM. We suggest you arrive no later than 3:00 PM.

hours.source_phrase: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM, from Valentine’s Day through Columbus Day.
hours.source_block:
Hours of Operation

10:00 AM - 4:00 PM, from Valentine’s Day through Columbus Day.

You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people. Ticket sales end at 3:30 PM, and no new customers will be admitted into the exhibits after 3:30 PM. We suggest you arrive no later than 3:00 PM.
